title: Was Jesus’ Last Supper A Mystery Ritual?
summary: This interview explores the hypothesis that Jesus' Last Supper was influenced by pagan mystery rituals, particularly Dionysian cult practices. It discusses the Pagan Continuity Hypothesis and scholarly comparisons between Christian communion and ancient polytheistic traditions involving the symbolic consumption of flesh and blood.

key_claims.claim: Martin Luther King wrote an essay called 'The Influence of Mystery Religions on Christianity' positing the Pagan Continuity Hypothesis
The Last Supper's eating of flesh and drinking of blood points to Dionysian cult imagery
The cult of Dionysus involved rites called sparagmos and omophagia
